subcodes.first_line: O thou who art yearning for reunion! Those who discover the secrets of the universe, and are aware of its inherent properties and concealed mysteries believe that an astonishing power of attraction is diffused throughout creation
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتاق دیدار کاشفان اسرار کون و واقفان خواض و سرائر مکنون بر آنند که قوه
subcodes.subjects: @one universal law; attractive power of love, @diversity an attribute; requirement of existence
